subcodes.first_line: The Book of the World shall be made manifest in all its mysteries, and through its letters shall be brought to its complete consummation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب عالم به اسرارش بتمامها ظاهر میشود و به حروفاتش بتمامها بانتها میرسد خدا
